title: Device Request - [Soil Sensor] - [Tuya] / [_TZE284_aao3yzhs TS0601]

diagComments.excerpt:
Hi! 👋

This device is **already supported** in [dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee) (Universal Tuya Zigbee fork) — **v5.11.14** with 138 drivers and 5,579+ fingerprints.

**Install the latest test version:**
https://homey.app/a/com.dlnraja.tuya.zigbee/test/

**Community forum for support:**
https://community.homey.app/t/app-pro-universal-tuya-zigbee-device-app-test/140352

After installing, delete and re-pair your device. If it still doesn't work, please share a **diagnostic report ID** and a **Homey Developer Tools interview** (https://tools.developer.homey.app).

## Expected Capabilities (based on device type)

| Capability | Notes |
|------------|-------|
| `measure_temperature` | Soil temperature |
| `measure_soil_moisture` | Soil moisture (custom capability) |
| `measure_battery` | Battery-powered device |

## Tuya DP Mapping (Expected)

Based on similar soil sensors (e.g., `_TZE200_9cqcpkgc`, `_TZE200_9cqcpkgc`):

| DP | Type | Purpose |
|----|------|---------|
| DP 1 | Value (0x02) | Temperature (÷10) |
| DP 2 | Value (0x02) | Humidity/Moisture (÷10) |
| DP 4 | Value (0x02) | Battery (÷2) |
| DP 5 | Value (0x02) | Temperature calibration |
| DP 6 | Value (0x02) | Humidity calibration |

## Driver Assignment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Likely Driver** | `climate_sensor` or `soil_sensor` |
| **Existing Support** | Check if `_TZE284_aao3yzhs` exists in any driver's fingerprints |
| **Action Required** | Add fingerprint to appropriate driver if not already present |

## Notes
- This is a **Tuya DP device** (cluster 0xEF00 present)
- **Sleepy device** (receiveWhenIdle: false) - first report may take up to 24 hours
- Similar to existing soil sensors like `_TZE200_9cqcpkgc` (TS0601_soil) and `_TZE200_9cqcpkgc` (TS0601_soil_2)
- Z2M reference: [TS0601_soil_3](https://www.zigbee2mqtt.io/devices/TS0601_soil_3.html)
